structural_claim: Spontaneous symmetry breaking generates mass while preserving the underlying gauge structure of interactions

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Gauge bosons acquire mass through scalar field vacuum expectation value without breaking gauge invariance
Scalar field with non-zero vacuum value generates mass for particles, confirming spontaneous symmetry breaking

supporting_results.result_name: Observation of the Higgs boson decay modes
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Single scalar field generates mass proportional to coupling strength, validating the mechanism
